title: Dogfly
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dogflies''' were stinging insects found in the jungles of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]].

==Appearances==
*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}}
